content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong broad-based rally with Bank Nifty +2.4%, Pharma +2.5%, Auto +2.2%, PSU Bank +2.7%. India VIX -5.3% to 16.96 confirming risk-on. A/D ratio favorable, multiple sectors leading. Late session (14:43) so new MIS entries off the table; CNC book is well-positioned and most names are in profit.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1037.53,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.6%; SL already at 1037.53 (~1.9% below CMP 1056.70) which is tight enough to lock substantial gain. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — keeping HOLD instead. Actually emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.9% position, gold rebounded today on geopolitical/FX backdrop. SL 119 (~4% below CMP) gives room for normal ETF chop. Hold for diversification/defensive sleeve."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.4% at all-time-high zone (CMP 1757, broke prior 1748 ATH). Trailing SL from 1715 to 1735 (~1.3% below CMP — within 1% trail-gap discipline at boundary, acceptable given strong tape close). Raising target to 1820 reflects clean breakout structure with JPM Overweight and Rs 1,833-1,980 street targets. Locks in ~2% gain minimum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%; SL at breakeven 4575 already correctly placed. CMP 4630, gain not yet at +2% threshold to trail higher. CRITICAL: May 14 board meeting (Q4 FY26 results) is 8 days away — will need to re-assess at next session for binary-event discipline (option b: tighten SL closer or option a: exit before May 14). Holding current SL for now; flagging event risk for management. No-op detected — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.2% with chemicals sector breakout (SRF, FLUOROCHEM, peers all firing). SL already at 6960 (~1.3% below CMP 7049). No-op detected — keeping HOLD via position_actions. Q4 was strong beat (+114% PAT), CDMO ramp + Chemours catalysts intact. Letting winner run with current trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2% on +9.84% session (basket move, not stock-specific catalyst per research). Q4 board meeting pending in May — binary event risk. SL at breakeven 838 (~0.9% below CMP 845) is appropriate given basket-rally vulnerability. No-op detected — HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 362.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.1% essentially flat. Q4 strong (PAT +30%), MOSL TP raised to 325 — wait, MOSL TP 325 is BELOW CMP 368.70 which signals stock has already run past street targets. Maintaining current SL/target. No-op — HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat position; SL 818 (~0.3% below CMP 822.55) is extremely tight — at risk of forced exit on normal noise but it's the stored level and tightening further would be self-stopout. Holding as-is; if stopped out, accept the small loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1265.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9% on Q4 print day (+11%). SL 1265 already at ~1.1% below CMP 1279 — acceptable trail gap. Q4 PAT optics flattered by tax reversal and Q1 FY27 guided FLAT — mixed picture. No-op — HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.1%; SL 2980 (~1.6% below CMP 3034) gives room. Defence basket strong but stock +48% in April — mean-reversion risk. Holding current SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3% on +10.46% session. SL 790 (~2.2% below CMP 807) appropriate room post gap-up volatility. Holding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1037.53 already at +5.4% above entry (locks in ~5.4% gain). Tightening further into close risks forced exit; thesis (HFC rate-cycle tailwind, ICICISec TP 1350) intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive sleeve; gold ETF inflows structurally strong; small loss acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH breakout day; trailing SL from 1715 to 1735 locks +2% min. Trail gap ~1.3% below CMP, within discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven (4575). May 14 board meeting/Q4 results = binary event in 6 trading sessions. Will need to choose exit/tighten/trim BEFORE May 13 close per binary-event discipline. Position size 11 shares ~Rs 51K = ~5% of portfolio, near the 5% threshold for event-trade tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 ~1.3% below CMP — appropriate trail. Chemicals breakout day, post-Q4 momentum intact. Let winner run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting pending in May — binary risk. Move was basket-driven. SL at breakeven appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat post-entry. SL 362 ~1.8% below CMP gives room. Q4 strong, NBFC tailwind intact. Stock above some street TPs which caps upside conviction."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 818 already extremely tight. Cannot loosen (guardrail blocks). Cannot tighten meaningfully without near-certain stopout. Accept stored level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print day +11%. SL 1265 below entry (1259) — wait, SL 1265 is ABOVE entry 1259, locks +0.5% gain. Mixed Q4 quality (tax reversal, Q1 FY27 flat guide). Tight trail acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain; sector strong but elevated technicals. SL 2980 gives ATR room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post gap-up, room needed for normal pullback. SL 790 appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA, SRF, M&M, AJANTPHARM, GRSE all making strong moves but session is late (14:43, 46 min to close) — too late for new CNC on extended intraday rallies; would be chasing. AUROPHARMA Q4 May 30 = binary in 3+ weeks (acceptable for entry but not at the high). M&M post-Q4 +5.7% rally — wait for consolidation Day 18. SRF +6.85% post-Q4 with deferred packaging capex flag — wait for pullback to 2600 zone. CANCEL the OPEN HFCL MIS BUY @ 133.50 — placed ~10 hours ago, clearly stale, would never fill at this point and HFCL not in current thesis.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 54%, cash 46% — well within risk envelope. 11 CNC positions, none breaching size or sector caps. Today's tape was strongly bullish; book captured ~+1.04% unrealized which is reasonable but win-rate context (14% over 5 days, profit factor 0.9x) demands continued discipline. KEY UPCOMING BINARY: HAL board meeting May 14 — must act on this position by Day 22-23 (May 13 close). Also TITAGARH Q4 pending in May. No new entries this session: too late in day for CNC chase on extended rallies, MIS cutoff already passed. Cluster check: Capital Goods/Defence cluster = HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH = ~17.5% capital, at the soft cluster ceiling — no further additions in this theme until one is exited. Financial Services cluster = PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS = ~22.5% — also at ceiling."
}
